projects.title: Accident Severity Prediction (AI/ML)
projects.description: Built an end-to-end ML pipeline (EDA, preprocessing, encoding) to predict PISEV and CSEV. Compared ensemble models (Random Forest, Voting, Stacking; experiments with AdaBoost/XGBoost) and handled imbalance using SMOTE.
projects.outcome: Best accuracy: 71.79% on PISEV (Stacking) and 99.20% on CSEV (Random Forest).

projects.title: Intellectus – Student Risk Analysis System
projects.description: Built a student risk analysis prototype using scikit-learn with a FastAPI inference backend and a React (Vite) dashboard.

projects.title: Proctor Exam Platform
projects.description: Built a full-stack online exam system with JWT auth and proctoring signals (tab switch/focus loss detection).
